description: A new 5G cell site has been physically installed. The agent must remotely configure and activate it.

nodes.task_description: Connect to the new cell site using its management IP address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent establishes a successful connection to the new hardware.

nodes.task_description: Load the standard 5G configuration template onto the device.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the configuration template.

nodes.task_description: Run post-configuration diagnostics to ensure the site is ready for activation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent runs diagnostics and receives a 'pass' status.

nodes.task_description: Activate the site, making it live on the public network.

expected_outcome.value: Agent executes the activation command and the site appears as 'active' on the network map.
